authoring_constraints.completion_requirement: Each action must be realistic within the declared time without extra explanation.

relaxation_order: Keep exact action cooldown in place and relax texture preferences first.
If no standard actions remain, allow one exact action whose last send was at least 10 days ago.
If no non-fallback action qualifies, allow the category fallback action if it has not been sent in the last 7 days.
If the library is still exhausted, return the oldest available action in the category and log the breach.

tiebreaker_order: prefer texture not used in the last 3 sends
prefer shorter minutes after a pause shift
prefer longer minutes after a completion shift

pause_rule.selection_note: Keep the same category but select the lightest eligible action nearest the downshifted target.

completion_rule.selection_note: Keep the same category but select the richest eligible action nearest the upshifted target.

selection_pipeline: Start with active actions in the selected category.
Exclude exact action ids inside the exact action cooldown window.
Determine target complexity from the category default plus any current streak shift.
If possible, exclude actions whose texture matches the most recent send in that category.
Score remaining actions by target complexity match, unseen status, and texture freshness.
If no candidate remains, relax rules in the order defined in no_repeat.relaxation_order.
If multiple actions still tie, pick the one with the oldest last-sent timestamp for that user and category.
